acquisition method: Data collection was performed using the data-dependent acquisition (DDA) procedure.
alkylation reagent: Cysteine alkylation was set as the fixed modification
cleavage agent: Trypsin/P was applied as the cleavage enzyme
enrichment method: incubated with pan anti-malonyllysine antibody conjugated agarose beads
fractionation method: High-pH reverse HPLC fractionation was used for peptides
instrument: mass spectrometry (MS) analysis by a Q Exactive Plus instrument
ionization type: injected into a nanospray ionization (NSI) ion source
labeling: qualitative proteomics of malonylation in S. sanghuang
